name: Manage Helm Repositories
description: Add, update, search, and manage Helm chart repositories to discover and install charts from public and private sources.

steps.title: Add popular chart repositories
steps.description: Register commonly used Helm chart repositories.
steps.command: helm repo add bitnami https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami && helm repo add ingress-nginx https://kubernetes.github.io/ingress-nginx && helm repo add jetstack https://charts.jetstack.io

steps.title: Update all repositories
steps.description: Fetch the latest chart index from all configured repos.
steps.tip: Run this before searching or installing to make sure you have the latest chart versions.

steps.title: Search for charts across repositories
steps.description: Find charts by keyword across all added repos.

steps.title: List configured repositories
steps.description: View all currently registered Helm repositories.

steps.title: Remove a repository
steps.description: Unregister a Helm chart repository you no longer need.

fullScript:
#!/bin/bash
# Helm Repository Management
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Current Repositories ==="
helm repo list 2>/dev/null || echo "No repositories configured"

echo ""
echo "=== Adding Common Repos ==="
repos=(
  "bitnami https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami"
  "ingress-nginx https://kubernetes.github.io/ingress-nginx"
  "jetstack https://charts.jetstack.io"
  "prometheus-community https://prometheus-community.github.io/helm-charts"
  "grafana https://grafana.github.io/helm-charts"
)

for entry in "${repos[@]}"; do
  name=$(echo "$entry" | awk '{print $1}')
  url=$(echo "$entry" | awk '{print $2}')
  helm repo add "$name" "$url" 2>/dev/null && echo "Added: $name" || echo "Already exists: $name"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Updating All Repos ==="
helm repo update

echo ""
echo "=== Repository Summary ==="
helm repo list

faq.question: Where is the local repository cache stored?
faq.answer: Helm stores repository cache in the Helm cache directory, typically ~/.cache/helm/repository/. Each repo gets an index YAML file that lists all available charts and versions.

faq.question: How do I add a repository that requires authentication?
faq.answer: Use --username and --password flags: 'helm repo add myrepo https://charts.example.com --username user --password pass'. For certificate auth, use --cert-file and --key-file.
